The '''CAP-2 Captivator''' was a model of [[Walker/Legends|walker]] employed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]<ref name="TL" /> and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].<ref name="Offscreen" /> Able to fit one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], the CAP-2 Captivator walked on two [[Limb/Legends|legs]], with the pilot standing upright in a bubble-enclosed canopy. Two mechanical arms ending in remote-operated [[Claw/Legends|claws]] extended from the front of the vehicle with a [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] mounted between them, and a large mechanism on the back held [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] for transport.<ref name="TL" /> The CAP-2 Captivator's feet contained [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] for spying on its prey.<ref name="Offscreen" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought by the Empire against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Imperial [[Spy/Legends|spies]] used the CAP-2 Captivator to capture unsuspecting Rebels.<ref name="TL" /> [[Bounty/Legends|Bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] often also used the walkers to capture their targets. [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] was one such bounty hunter who used a CAP-2 Captivator for that purpose.<ref name="Offscreen" />

==Behind the scenes==
The CAP-2 Captivator was created in [[1982]] for [[Kenner Products|Kenner's]] [[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back (toy line)|''Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' toy line]]. The figure's packaging showed Bossk using the walker to capture Rebel [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ledick Firest/Legends|Ledick Firest]] and deliver<ref name="TL" /> him<ref name="CSWE-Ledick Firest">{{CSWECite|I|275|Firest, Colonel Ledick}}</ref> to the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="TL" />
